title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist is an AI system that automates medical discoveries by analyzing large datasets to identify new treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, vision loss, and other conditions. It includes a self-ranking mechanism and outperforms human experts on specific discovery tasks.
